title: ScreenCall
description: A screen call records a screen view in a mobile application.

userId.description: Unique identifier for the user in your database.

anonymousId.description: A pseudo-unique substitute for a user ID.

properties.description: Free-form dictionary of properties of the screen.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 date string when the message was originally sent.

messageId.description: Unique identifier for the message to deduplicate.
